subcodes.title: Suriy-i-'Ibad
subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and verily all are His worshippers. God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and verily all [3.5s]... ...Contemplate with thine inward eye the chain of successive Revelations that hath linked the Manifestation of Adam
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و انا کل له عابدون شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و انا کل
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @exhortations and counsels, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
